prompt_inputs.goal: Maintain current weight while eating nutritious meals on a $15 daily budget

solution_criteria: Total cost of all meals does not exceed $15
Meal plan includes breakfast, lunch, and dinner with adequate calories and macronutrients
All ingredients are affordable and shelf-stable or require minimal refrigeration
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single woman
scenario: Testing with budget optimization: Single woman on a tight budget of $15 total for the entire day's meals, requiring the plan to use affordable, shelf-stable ingredients while maintaining adequate nutrition

prompt_inputs.goal: Maintain current weight with balanced nutrition
prompt_inputs.restrictions: Vegan diet, nut allergy, avoid cross-contamination

solution_criteria: All meals are completely plant-based with no animal products
All meals are safe for nut allergies with no nuts or nut-derived ingredients
Meal plan covers breakfast, lunch, dinner, and snacks for one full day
Plan is compact and concise (under 400 words)
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single woman
scenario: Testing with dietary restrictions: Single woman following a vegan diet with a nut allergy, ensuring all meals are plant-based, nutritionally balanced, and safe from cross-contamination concerns

prompt_inputs.goal: maintain weight while eating healthy despite busy schedule

solution_criteria: All meals are prepared or assembled in 15 minutes or less
Plan includes nutritionally balanced breakfast, lunch, and dinner with no-cook or minimal-prep options
All meals comply with gluten-free and vegetarian restrictions
Meals are satisfying and suitable for weight maintenance goals
task_description: Write a compact, concise 1 day meal plan for a single woman
scenario: Testing with extreme time constraints: Busy professional woman with only 15 minutes available per meal, requiring quick-prep or no-cook options that are still nutritious and satisfying
